name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M11749 White] This elegant Cléa wallet is crafted from soft Mahina calfskin, reinterpreting the classic Monogram pattern with perforated decoration. Its compact size fits into any Mahina bag. One side features a zip coin pocket, the other has six card slots, and the back has an open bill compartment. size: 11x8.5x3.5cm C
